title: DARENYI Glass Vase 20cm Clear Flower Vase for Living Room, Home, Office or Wedding
features: Size: The glass fower vase height is 8 inch, vase mouth diameter is 3.34 inch, making it stable to hold even large bouquets.
Stylish Design: This glass vase is cleverly designed with a playful and cute waist shape,great for flower arrangements or dried flower designs, brings your flowers a beautiful display.

Glass Material: This clear glass vase is made of glass material ,the bottom of the bottle is thickened and not easy to shake, and the flower arrangement is more stable, the mouth of the vase is polished and smooth to protect your hands.
Exquisite Gift: The flower vase bottle is a very surprise gift, it can be a great gift for Christmas, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary and other festivals.
Safe Packaging: This clear vase will be carefully wrapped in foam to avoid damage during shipping, if there is any problem with the product, please communicate with us promptly.
description: Product Description This is a great glass vase,exquisite and beautiful, durable and easy to clean,very suitable to be placed in the home or office,and can also create a pretty arrangement for a wedding, birthday, party, coffee house, restaurant, home furnishing or any special romantic events. Feature： 1.The mouth of the glass vase is polished and smooth, and it feels mild to the touch; the bottom of the glass vase is polished and thick, and it is more stable on the table. 2.This glass vase is cleverly designed with a playful and cute waist shape to break the dullness in the corners of the space and make the home life full of vitality,keep your mood beautiful. 3.This beautiful glass bottle can not only be used to decorate flowers, but also can be used as a storage jar for candy, shells, gems, you can put anything you want to decorate it, it will always be useful to you. Vase Size 8 inches *3.34 inches Material Transparent Glass Perfect Decoration Stunning glass vases for tabletop. Note: If you receive a vase that is somewhat "dirty", please don't worry, because the vase takes a long time during transportation and will fog up when exposed to humid air. This is a normal phenomenon. Just use a long handled brush and rinse with water to get a crystal clear vase! Packing list: 1 x Clear Glass Vase Tip:Just a glass vase, no flowers. Service description: If you are not satisfied with our vase in use, please let us know and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
